The user wants me to identify all temporal segments where Diane Sawyer (Martha Raddatz) appears in the video.

1.  **Analyze the video for Diane Sawyer's appearances.**
    *   00:04 - 00:11: She is speaking to the camera, introducing the segment.
    *   00:42 - 00:58: She is speaking to the camera again, continuing the introduction.
    *   00:59 - 01:10: She is walking with Zelensky through the destroyed factory.
    *   01:19 - 01:25: She is sitting and interviewing Zelensky.
    *   01:39 - 01:41: She is listening to Zelensky.
    *   01:59 - 02:01: She is listening to Zelensky.
    *   02:13 - 02:16: She is listening to Zelensky.
    *   02:16 - 02:21: She is listening to Zelensky.
    *   04:04 - 04:07: She is speaking to Zelensky.
    *   04:12 - 04:23: She is speaking to Zelensky.
    *   04:57 - 05:04: She is speaking to Zelensky.
    *   05:06 - 05:07: She is listening to Zelensky.

2.  **Group and refine segments.**
    *   Segment 1: 00:04 - 00:11 (Speaking to camera)
    *   Segment 2: 00:42 - 00:58 (Speaking to camera)
    *   Segment 3: 00:59 - 01:10 (Walking with Zelensky)
    *   Segment 4: 01:19 - 01:25 (Interviewing Zelensky)
    *   Segment 5: 01:39 - 01:41 (Listening to Zelensky)
    *   Segment 6: 01:59 - 02:01 (Listening to Zelensky)
    *   Segment 7: 02:13 - 02:21 (Listening to Zelensky - combining 02:13-02:16 and 02:16-02:21 as they are continuous shots of her listening)
    *   Segment 8: 04:04 - 04:07 (Speaking to Zelensky)
    *   Segment 9: 04:12 - 04:23 (Speaking to Zelensky)
    *   Segment 10: 04:57 - 05:07 (Speaking and listening to Zelensky - combining 04:57-05:04 and 05:06-05:07 as they are part of the same interview sequence)

3.  **Format the output.**
    *   Ensure timestamps are accurate.
    *   Describe actions and presence.

    *   00:04 - 00:11: upper-body, face visible, center, speaking to camera.
    *   00:42 - 00:58: upper-body, face visible, center, speaking to camera.
    *   00:59 - 01:10: full-body, face visible, center/right, walking with Zelensky.
    *   01:19 - 01:25: upper-body, face visible, right, interviewing Zelensky.
    *   01:39 - 01:41: upper-body, face visible, right, listening to Zelensky.
    *   01:59 - 02:01: upper-body, face visible, right, listening to Zelensky.
    *   02:13 - 02:21: upper-body, face visible, right, listening to Zelensky.
    *   04:04 - 04:07: upper-body, face visible, center, speaking to Zelensky.
    *   04:12 - 04:23: upper-body, face visible, center, speaking to Zelensky.
    *   04:57 - 05:07: upper-body, face visible, center, speaking and listening to Zelensky.
